name: Rectangle3d
summary: Represents the values of a plane and two intervals that form an oriented rectangle in three dimensions.

constructors.name: Rectangle3d(Plane, Interval, Interval)
constructors.signature: public Rectangle3d(Plane plane, Interval width, Interval height)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new rectangle from dimensions.

params.name: plane
params.doc: Base plane for Rectangle.

params.name: width
params.doc: Dimension of rectangle along the base plane x-axis.

params.name: height
params.doc: Dimension of rectangle along the base plane y-axis.

constructors.name: Rectangle3d(Plane, Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Rectangle3d(Plane plane, Point3d cornerA, Point3d cornerB)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new rectangle from a base plane and two corner points.

params.name: plane
params.doc: Base plane for Rectangle.

params.name: cornerA
params.doc: First corner of Rectangle (will be projected onto plane).

params.name: cornerB
params.doc: Second corner of Rectangle (will be projected onto plane).

constructors.name: Rectangle3d(Plane, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Rectangle3d(Plane plane, double width, double height)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new rectangle from width and height.

params.name: plane
params.doc: Base plane for Rectangle.

params.name: width
params.doc: Width (as measured along the base plane x-axis) of rectangle.

params.name: height
params.doc: Height (as measured along the base plane y-axis) of rectangle.

methods.name: ClosestPoint(Point3d)
methods.summary: Gets the point on the rectangle that is closest to a test-point.

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to project.

returns.doc: The point on or in the rectangle closest to the test point or Point3d.Unset on failure.

methods.name: ClosestPoint(Point3d, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Point3d ClosestPoint(Point3d point, bool includeInterior)
methods.summary: Gets the point on the rectangle that is closest to a test-point.

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to project.

params.name: includeInterior
params.doc: If false, the point is projected onto the boundary edge only, otherwise the interior of the rectangle is also taken into consideration.

returns.doc: The point on the rectangle closest to the test point or Point3d.Unset on failure.

methods.name: Contains(Point3d)
methods.summary: Determines if a point is included in this rectangle.

params.name: pt
params.doc: Point to test. The point will be projected onto the Rectangle plane before inclusion is determined.

methods.name: Contains(Double, Double)
methods.signature: public PointContainment Contains(double x, double y)
methods.summary: Determines if two plane parameters are included in this rectangle.

params.name: x
params.doc: Parameter along base plane X direction.

params.name: y
params.doc: Parameter along base plane Y direction.

methods.name: Corner
methods.summary: Gets the corner at the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of corner, valid values are: 0 = lower left (min-x, min-y)1 = lower right (max-x, min-y)2 = upper right (max-x, max-y)3 = upper left (min-x, max-y)

returns.doc: The point at the given corner index.

methods.name: CreateFromPolyline(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
methods.summary: Attempts to create a rectangle from a polyline. This method only works well for polylines that already closely resemble rectangles. If the polyline contains more than four vertices, the least significant ones will be ignored. If the polylines is non-orthogonal, the discrepancies will be averaged away. This method should not be used as a Rectangle fitter.

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline to parse.

returns.doc: A rectangle that is shaped similarly to the polyline or Rectangle3d.Unset if the polyline does not represent a rectangle.

methods.name: CreateFromPolyline(IEnumerable<Point3d>, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static Rectangle3d CreateFromPolyline(IEnumerable<Point3d> polyline, out double deviation, out double angleDeviation)
methods.summary: Attempts to create a rectangle from a polyline. This method only works well for polylines that already closely resemble rectangles. If the polyline contains more than four vertices, the least significant ones will be ignored. If the polylines is non-orthogonal, the discrepancies will be averaged away. This method should not be used as a Rectangle fitter.

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline to parse.

params.name: deviation
params.doc: On success, the deviation will contain the largest deviation between the polyline and the rectangle.

params.name: angleDeviation
params.doc: On success, the angleDeviation will contain the largest deviation (in radians) between the polyline edges and the rectangle edges.

returns.doc: A rectangle that is shaped similarly to the polyline or Rectangle3d.Unset if the polyline does not represent a rectangle.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Rectangle3d other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

params.name: other
params.doc: [Missing <param name="other"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Rectangle3d.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Rectangle3d,System.Double)"]

params.name: epsilon
params.doc: [Missing <param name="epsilon"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Rectangle3d.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Rectangle3d,System.Double)"]

methods.name: MakeIncreasing
methods.summary: Ensures the X and Y dimensions are increasing or singleton intervals.

methods.name: PointAt(Double)
methods.summary: Gets a point along the rectangle boundary.

params.name: t
params.doc: Parameter along rectangle boundary. Valid values range from 0.0 to 4.0, where each integer domain represents a single boundary edge.

returns.doc: The point at the given boundary parameter.

methods.name: PointAt(Double, Double)
methods.signature: public Point3d PointAt(double x, double y)
methods.summary: Gets a point in Rectangle space.

params.name: x
params.doc: Normalized parameter along Rectangle width.

params.name: y
params.doc: Normalized parameter along Rectangle height.

returns.doc: The point at the given x,y parameter.

methods.name: RecenterPlane(Int32)
methods.summary: Re-centers the base plane on one of the corners.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of corner, valid values are: 0 = lower left (min-x, min-y)1 = lower right (max-x, min-y)2 = upper right (max-x, max-y)3 = upper left (min-x, max-y)

methods.name: RecenterPlane(Point3d)
methods.summary: Re-centers the base plane on a new origin.

params.name: origin
params.doc: New origin for plane.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve
methods.summary: Constructs a nurbs curve representation of this rectangle.

returns.doc: A nurbs curve with the same shape as this rectangle.

methods.name: ToPolyline
methods.summary: Constructs a polyline from this rectangle.

returns.doc: A polyline with the same shape as this rectangle.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms this rectangle. Note that rectangles cannot be skewed or tapered.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation to apply.

properties.name: Area
properties.summary: Gets the unsigned Area of the rectangle.

properties.name: BoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets the world aligned bounding box for this rectangle.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets the point in the center of the rectangle.

properties.name: Circumference
properties.summary: Gets the circumference of the rectangle.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: Gets the signed height of the rectangle. If the Y dimension is decreasing, the height will be negative.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this is a valid rectangle. A rectangle is considered to be valid when the base plane and both dimensions are valid.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the base plane of the rectangle.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a rectangle with Unset components.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Gets the signed width of the rectangle. If the X dimension is decreasing, the width will be negative.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dimensions of the rectangle along the base plane X-Axis (i.e. the width).

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dimensions of the rectangle along the base plane Y-Axis (i.e. the height).
